must_fix: Blocking: packages/db/src/telegram-egress.ts markSending allows status='sending' and listReadyToRetry immediately selects status='sending' rows; apps/core/src/actions/tool-gateway.ts sends after markSending without an exclusive claim. Concurrent duplicate execution or retry-worker overlap for the same action_id can perform multiple Bot API sendMessage side effects before any sent terminal state is observed, violating AC-F0029-12/13 and duplicate-prevention NFR. Fix by making send acquisition an exclusive compare-and-set/lease that only one worker can own, adding a stale-sending recovery window or locked retry selection, and adding concurrency/retry overlap tests that assert one transport call per action_id.
evidence: Review inspected current uncommitted F-0029 diff, including tool-gateway, runtime retry worker, telegram egress store/migration, fake Telegram API, smoke harness, contract/config/support/reporting tests.

notes: FAIL: blocking idempotency/concurrency bug in Telegram egress send ownership; same action_id can execute multiple Bot API sendMessage calls.
